description: Normal /sigint:start with topic triggers elicitation and references research-orchestrator
prompt: /sigint:start AI-powered supply chain optimization for agriculture

expectations.description: Output asks elicitation questions to scope the research
Output references research-orchestrator for delegation
Output does not contain deprecated TodoWrite pattern
Output does not contain deprecated Subcog pattern
Output does not contain deprecated subagent_type pattern
Output does not reference deprecated market-researcher agent

description: /sigint:start with no topic triggers open discovery elicitation

expectations.description: Output asks what topic or area the user wants to research
Output provides open-ended discovery prompts or asks for research area
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: /sigint:start --quick triggers abbreviated elicitation flow
prompt: /sigint:start --quick Edge computing for IoT in manufacturing

expectations.description: Output uses abbreviated or streamlined elicitation rather than full question set
Output references research-orchestrator for delegation
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: Verify TodoWrite is never used in /sigint:start transcript
prompt: /sigint:start Renewable energy storage market in Southeast Asia

expectations.description: TodoWrite never appears anywhere in the output
Output uses TaskCreate or task-based planning instead of TodoWrite

description: Verify Subcog is never referenced in /sigint:start transcript
prompt: /sigint:start Digital health platforms for chronic disease management

expectations.description: Subcog never appears in the output
Output uses Atlatl memory system instead of Subcog
Output does not contain other deprecated patterns

description: Verify /sigint:start references Atlatl memory capture for persisting research context
prompt: /sigint:start Autonomous vehicle regulations in the EU

expectations.description: Output references Atlatl memory capture for research persistence
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: Verify /sigint:start delegates to research-orchestrator, not market-researcher
prompt: /sigint:start Quantum computing applications in financial services

expectations.description: Output references research-orchestrator for delegation
Output never references deprecated market-researcher agent
Output does not contain other deprecated patterns

description: Verify /sigint:start references TaskCreate for research plan execution
prompt: /sigint:start Precision fermentation market for alternative proteins

expectations.description: Output references TaskCreate or task creation for research plan
Output references research-orchestrator
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: Default /sigint:init loads Atlatl context and displays readiness

expectations.description: Output indicates Atlatl context loading or initialization
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: /sigint:init --full triggers comprehensive memory load

expectations.description: Output indicates comprehensive or full memory load
Output references Atlatl memory system
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: /sigint:init --topic scopes recall to a specific topic

expectations.description: Output scopes context loading to the specified topic
Output references recall_memories or Atlatl for topic-scoped retrieval
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: Verify /sigint:init uses Atlatl namespaces, not Subcog namespaces

expectations.description: Output never references Subcog namespace format
Output references Atlatl namespace conventions
Output does not contain other deprecated patterns

description: Verify /sigint:init references correct Atlatl namespaces

expectations.description: Output references _semantic/knowledge namespace
Output references _procedural/patterns namespace
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

description: Verify /sigint:init references cascading config loading

expectations.description: Output mentions config loading from global and/or project sources
Output does not contain deprecated patterns

expectations.description: Output acknowledges the executive-brief format
Output acknowledges the C-suite audience
Output references report-synthesizer

description: Verify TodoWrite never appears in /sigint:report transcript

Output does not contain other deprecated patterns

expectations.description: Output never references market-researcher
